description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with postgres:latest and redis:latest services and set POSTGRES_DB and POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables. Include a before_script that runs ruby -v, which ruby, sh setup.sh, gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, bundle check || bundle install, and bundle exec rake db:create RAILS_ENV=test and bundle exec rake db:migrate RAILS_ENV=test for all jobs. Define an rspec job in the test stage that runs bundle exec rspec. No artifacts, caches, or special rules are needed.
